ddls:
CREATE TABLE "queries" (
  "query_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each query */,
  "sql_id" TEXT /* ID of the SQL statement */,
  "sql_text" TEXT /* Text of the SQL statement */,
  "dbms" TEXT /* Database management system (DBMS) used */,
  "query_type" TEXT /* Type of query (e.g., SELECT, INSERT, UPDATE, DELETE) */,
  "execution_time" REAL /* Total execution time of the query */,
  "cpu_time" REAL /* CPU time used by the query */,
  "io_time" REAL /* I/O time used by the query */,
  "query_tags" TEXT /* Tags for the query (e.g., application, module) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the query was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the query was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("query_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_queries_dbms FOREIGN KEY ("dbms") REFERENCES dbms ("dbms_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_queries_query_type FOREIGN KEY ("query_type") REFERENCES query_types ("query_type_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "dbms" (
  "dbms_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each DBMS */,
  "dbms_name" TEXT /* Name of the DBMS */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the DBMS */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the DBMS */,
  "edition" TEXT /* Edition of the DBMS (e.g., Enterprise, Standard) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dbms_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "query_types" (
  "query_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each query type */,
  "query_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the query type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the query type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("query_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., database administrator, developer, analyst) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Password hash for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "query_executions" (
  "execution_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each query execution */,
  "query_id" INTEGER /* ID of the query executed */,
  "execution_time" REAL /* Execution time of the query */,
  "cpu_time" REAL /* CPU time used by the query */,
  "io_time" REAL /* I/O time used by the query */,
  "rows_processed" INTEGER /* Number of rows processed by the query */,
  "rows_affected" INTEGER /* Number of rows affected by the query */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("execution_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_query_executions_query_id FOREIGN KEY ("query_id") REFERENCES queries ("query_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "query_performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric */,
  "query_id" INTEGER /* ID of the query */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the metric (e.g., execution time, CPU time, I/O time) */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the metric */,
  "metric_date" TEXT /* Date the metric was collected */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_query_performance_metrics_query_id FOREIGN KEY ("query_id") REFERENCES queries ("query_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "query_categorizations" (
  "categorization_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each categorization */,
  "query_id" INTEGER /* ID of the query */,
  "query_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the query type */,
  "dbms_id" INTEGER /* ID of the DBMS */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("categorization_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_query_categorizations_dbms_id FOREIGN KEY ("dbms_id") REFERENCES dbms ("dbms_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_query_categorizations_query_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("query_type_id") REFERENCES query_types ("query_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_query_categorizations_query_id FOREIGN KEY ("query_id") REFERENCES queries ("query_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dbms_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "dbms_id" INTEGER /* ID of the DBMS */,
  "version_name" TEXT /* Name of the version */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dbms_versions_dbms_id FOREIGN KEY ("dbms_id") REFERENCES dbms ("dbms_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "query_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "query_id" INTEGER /* ID of the query */,
  "version_name" TEXT /* Name of the version */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_query_versions_query_id FOREIGN KEY ("query_id") REFERENCES queries ("query_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "query_id" INTEGER /* ID of the query accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of access */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_query_id FOREIGN KEY ("query_id") REFERENCES queries ("query_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "query_alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "query_id" INTEGER /* ID of the query */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., execution time exceeded, CPU time exceeded) */,
  "alert_date" TEXT /* Date the alert was triggered */,
  "alert_level" TEXT /* Level of the alert (e.g., warning, critical) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_query_alerts_query_id FOREIGN KEY ("query_id") REFERENCES queries ("query_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "query_dashboards" (
  "dashboard_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dashboard */,
  "query_id" INTEGER /* ID of the query */,
  "dashboard_name" TEXT /* Name of the dashboard */,
  "dashboard_description" TEXT /* Description of the dashboard */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dashboard_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_query_dashboards_query_id FOREIGN KEY ("query_id") REFERENCES queries ("query_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "query_visualizations" (
  "visualization_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each visualization */,
  "query_id" INTEGER /* ID of the query */,
  "visualization_name" TEXT /* Name of the visualization */,
  "visualization_description" TEXT /* Description of the visualization */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("visualization_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_query_visualizations_query_id FOREIGN KEY ("query_id") REFERENCES queries ("query_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "integrations" (
  "integration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each integration */,
  "tool_name" TEXT /* Name of the tool */,
  "integration_type" TEXT /* Type of integration (e.g., API, plugin) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("integration_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "query_tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "query_id" INTEGER /* ID of the query */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  "tag_description" TEXT /* Description of the tag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_query_tags_query_id FOREIGN KEY ("query_id") REFERENCES queries ("query_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "query_dependencies" (
  "dependency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dependency */,
  "query_id" INTEGER /* ID of the query */,
  "dependent_query_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dependent query */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dependency_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_query_dependencies_dependent_query_id FOREIGN KEY ("dependent_query_id") REFERENCES queries ("query_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_query_dependencies_query_id FOREIGN KEY ("query_id") REFERENCES queries ("query_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "query_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "query_id" INTEGER /* ID of the query */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date the comment was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_query_comments_query_id FOREIGN KEY ("query_id") REFERENCES queries ("query_id")
)
